'''Kozar''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|general]] stationed in the [[Noonian system]] some [[Time/Legends|time]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He discovered an abundance of goods stolen by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] from [[Nebula Consumables]] ships in the Noonian [[Star system/Legends|system]] when a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base on [[Movris]] was [[Battle of Movris|shut down]]. He informed his superior [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Trophan Thanis]] about the find who suspected that the pirates may have been [[Rebel privateer]]s.
